title: paspalum lasiogonum
intro: Paspalum lasiogonum, also known as Lasio, is a type of grass that belongs to the Paspalum genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum lasiogonum include treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
